headline: Trump 🍊🔫 'Locked & Loaded' for Iran Protests 💥😤 – FM Calls it RECKLESS RAGE 🚫🇮🇷
text:
Iran's FM Abbas Araghchi 👨‍💼🇮🇷 SLAMMING 🍑💥 Donny T's RECKLESS DADDY THREATS 😡🔥, calling that 'US will RESCUE 👼🦸 protesters if you KILL 'em' tweet a DANGEROUS DUMPSTER FIRE 🗑️💣! Trump 🍊🐸 posted Friday: 'If Iran SHOOTS 😵🔫 peaceful peeps (their CUSTOM 😈), USA's LOCKED & LOADED 🛡️🍆 READY TO ROLL 🚀!' No deets on the MIC DROP 🎤, but Iran armed forces on STANDBY 😤🎯 'know EXACTLY where to AIM' – cue WW3 VIBES 🌍💥!

Protests POPPIN' OFF 🥳🔥 over RIAL CRASH 📉💸💸 – shopkeepers in Tehran MAD AF 😡🛒 at currency TANKING vs USD 🤑🇺🇸, students JUMPIN' IN 📚🚀 chanting ANTI-CLERIC 👑🚫! Spread to CITIES 👀🏙️ with BATTLES 🤼‍♂️🔫 – 8 DEAD 😢⚰️ so far: Ahmad Jalil & Sajjad Valamanesh GOOSED 🍆💀 in Lordegan, 3 in Azna, more in Kouhdasht, Fuladshahr, Marvdasht – Fars & Hengaw SPILLIN' TEA ☕🔥 but BBC like 'UNVERIFIED 👀'!

Araghchi CLAPPING BACK 👏😏: 'Trump deployed National Guard 🛡️🇺🇸 at home, so DON'T TOLERATE attacks on PUBLIC PROPERTY 🏛️🚫 – we REJECT interference HARDER THAN Khamenei rejects Netflix 🍆📱!' Police spokesman: 'No ENEMIES turning UNREST into CHAOS 🤡🔥!' Pezeshkian 👨‍💼🇮🇷 all 'I LISTEN to LEGIT DEMANDS 👂😇' but Prosecutor & Ayatollah Khamenei 🧔👑 say RIOTERS GET PUT IN PLACE 🪦💥 – fair protests OK, but THUGS? SMASHED LIKE BAD HIJAB VIBES 🧕🚫 (Mahsa Amini 2022 FLASHBACK 😢✊)!

Iran UN Amb Iravani 📜🌐 BEGGIN' Security Council to CONDEMN Trump's BEEF 🥩😤: 'We'll HIT BACK DECISIVELY ⚖️🔥 – USA OWNS the ESCALATION ORGY 💦🌋!' Trump remixin' old hits 🎶 – past NUCLEAR STRIKES 🇮🇷☢️ got Qatar base SLAPPED BACK 🏗️💥! Wall Street simps 🤡📉 sweatin' OIL PRICES ⛽📈 while Jensen Huang vibes stayin' AI-chill 🤖🤑, but this Iran-US TANGO 💃🕺 could MOON 🌕 crude like NVDA chips! Ayatollah: 'Shopkeeps FAIR GAME 😤💰, but RIOT CUCKS? YEETED 🚫😩!' Protests BIGGEST since Amini UPRISING ✊🇮🇷 but not FULL ORGY SCALE 👯‍♂️ – Tehran shop SLAY 💔 to nationwide RUMBLE 🤼‍♀️🌍. Hold my falafel 🍤 – geopolitical DRAMA hotter than Epstein files drop 💣🛌!
